description: Determine the volleyball league playoff seeding by calculating standings with a scoring system of 3 points per win and 1 point per loss. Include winning percentages and sort the results by total points and then winning percentage. Save the final standings to /home/ga/Documents/standings.csv.

natural_language.prompt: You have a volleyball league standings table. Calculate points for each team (wins are worth 3 points, losses are worth 1 point), calculate winning percentages, and sort the teams from highest to lowest points to determine playoff seeding.
